instagram.caption:
Security tip: Recommended Study Timeline

Plan for approximately 4-6 weeks of dedicated study. Here is a suggested weekly breakdown: Week 1: Core Data: Data types, storage models, OLTP vs OLAP, data roles Week 2: Relational Data: Azure SQL, n...

- Week 1: Core Data: Data types, storage models, OLTP vs OLAP, data roles
- Week 2: Relational Data: Azure SQL, normalization, keys, joins, indexing
- Week 3: Relational Data: Azure SQL DB, SQL Managed Instance, PostgreSQL, MySQL
- Week 4: Non-Relational Data: Cosmos DB, Table Storage, Blob Storage, Azure Files
